creator: alan@batie.org
text: Nothing special behind the scenes, just a fresh install of freebsd and then some ports.  I just did a portsnap update to see if the problem still occurred, but it wants to update php, except it's complaining that "php5-5.4.41 has known vulnerabilities" (duh, it's php ;-) ) and I don't have time to fight with it right now...
